name: Pipit
bio:
Goblin Gardener, Net of Secrets Blitz Attacker. He launches fast attacks with a Hidden Hoe to protect villages from invasion.

Role: Physical Single Elimination
Intro: A Physical Damage Dealer hero with a certain lifesteal ability and can deal high damage to enemies with high HP.

skillSlots.name: Tilling and Fertilizing
skillSlots.description: Attacks single backline enemy target, dealing 159% P.DMG while ignoring 20% of target's DEF.

skillSlots.name: Weeding Time
skillSlots.description: Deals 233% P.DMG to single backline enemy target. DMG increased by 30% against targets with HP above 50%.
